currentFocus: Repo-quality hash closeout is accepted and the public-candidate/curated-export wording classification is closed with no docs edit needed; docs/state truth now points to a read-first main/state verification slice.

publicMain.nextWriteRequirement: Re-read live git truth before treating any exact main commit as current.

currentDocsTruth.publicPrimaryRepo: The public repo is the normal collaboration surface, not a sparse export.
currentDocsTruth.stateReconciliation: goal.md, developer_agent_state.json, and documentation_agent_state.json now record accepted hash-closeout evidence, close the wording classification as no-edit, and point the next baton at bounded public-main/state verification.
currentDocsTruth.wordingClassification: No clearly stale non-validation public-candidate or curated-export wording requiring a docs edit was found.
currentDocsTruth.releasePublicationStatus: No release was built, published, signed, pushed as a package, or announced.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: Docs/state refresh only; no product source, product tests, package scripts, patch catalogs, release artifacts, AppCore, WinUI, CLI, runtime/proof scripts, Ghidra content, game files, installed game folder, original BEA.exe, product/runtime/test behavior, release/publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference claim, Ghidra, hard-payload, or installed-game/original-BEA mutation change.
currentDocsTruth.localOnlyBoundary: Hard payloads, screenshots/frame dumps, raw proof logs, copied executables, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env* files, build output, local runtime caches, local campaign logs, active thread/session IDs, raw proof evidence, and local proof paths stay out of tracked docs/state.

validation.currentStateRefresh: Validate with JSON parsing, stale-reference scan, docs/repo hygiene gates, public allowlist, hard-payload safety, and git diff checks.
validation.nextSlice: Use docs/state gates for documentation-only cleanup and add the relevant WinUI/AppCore gates before claiming any code or UI behavior change.

nextSteps: Start from clean main and verify HEAD, origin/main, and live remote refs/heads/main before writing.

Keep product, runtime, release publication, Host/Join, online readiness, runtime audio, gameplay, visual, rebuild, no-noticeable-difference, Ghidra, hard-payload, and installed-game mutation claims bounded to accepted evidence.
